metadata.title: In Memory of Dr. William Wei Hsu - Dr. Brien Hsu
metadata.twitter:creator: @drbrienhsu
metadata.author: brienhsu
metadata.og:description: February 3rd, 2017 Last night at around 8:00 pm, I sat at my desk in my group practice, looking at a pile of about 50 patient charts that I needed to finish up. I was thinking, how in the world was a going to write the closing eulogy for my dad’s funeral, taking place tomorrow? […]
